text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
choice_data_list:
I'm guessing you didn't get much rest
yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Actually... I had a really productive day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I offered to help people with their troubles using
feng shui, and a lot more people sent requests
than I expected...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
By the time I'd finished replying to everyone, it
was already morning... Heh heh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey does look happy, but she also
seems fairly sleep-deprived.
